faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.sub: Answers to the most common questions. Didn't find yours — just reach out.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: The cost depends on the scope, complexity, and timeline of your project. We give an exact quote after a short discovery call — no hidden fees, no surprises.
A landing page takes 1-2 weeks. A corporate site — 2-4 weeks. A mobile app or SaaS platform — 4-8 weeks. Timelines depend on scope and the number of revision rounds.
We start with a call or chat to understand your task. Then we design in Figma — you approve. After that we build and show weekly progress. We deliver the finished product with documentation.

items.q: Do you provide support after delivery?
items.a: Yes. The first month after delivery is free support and bug fixes. After that we can sign a maintenance contract: updates, new features, technical support.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes, we work with clients from Europe and the US. We communicate in English and invoice in USD or EUR. Our timezone is UTC+2/UTC+3.

items.q: What do I need to get started?
items.a: Just message us on Telegram or fill out the form below. Tell us about your idea — we'll ask a few questions and suggest a solution. No formal brief required to start.

contact.title: Let's start
contact.sub: Tell us about your project — we'll respond within a few hours.
